query:
INSERT INTO customer_rules (configId, customerId, customerName, facilityId, facilityName, noLotMixing, locationPriorityPatterns, notes)
VALUES (
  3,
  145,
  'Amercare',
  4,
  'CAL-Calgary',
  0,
  JSON_ARRAY(
    JSON_OBJECT('pattern', '^12', 'label', 'Building 2 – 12xxxx locations'),
    JSON_OBJECT('pattern', '^RCV12', 'label', 'Building 2 – RCV12 locations')
  ),
  'Calgary warehouse: prioritize Building 2 locations (12#### and RCV12) over Building 1 (<12) locations.'
);
